blended.narrative: Marmot Basin is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.9 inches of dry powder expected. Snow levels around 3,440 ft. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 3.6" of snow, highs of 18°F. Expect powder.
Thursday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 20°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 3.3" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
